title: Task pack #2 delivered → mapped + validated + merged
context: Following the M0 pilot (pilot-007) and with the conflation tool (conflation-008) available, the second task pack applies the full pipeline to a confirmed partner's area. The pack uses conflation-008 output for gap detection, passes both blocking gates, is assembled from the template, and reaches a validated, merged outcome. This is the first pack to leverage the AI gap-detection tooling in production.
objective: Assemble, execute, and document the second task pack using conflation-008, pass both gates, and reach a validated, merged outcome for a confirmed partner area.
acceptanceCriteria: Pack is built on a confirmed partner area from partner-011 with verifiedNeed:true and requestor set.
Gap detection uses conflation-008 to produce a reviewed candidate list from an authorized, ODbL-compatible source.
Area passed imagery-gate-002 and harm-gate-003 with both artifacts committed.
Pack assembled from template-004 and tagging-005; effort registered as OSMF Organised Editing.
Features mapped by a human and validated and merged into OSM (not reverted); validator sign-off and changeset/TM references recorded in outcomes/<pack-id>.json.
All OSM-derived outputs licensed ODbL-1.0; no OSM write credentials used by any tool.
Reviewed by the licensing/imagery reviewer, do-no-harm reviewer, and experienced OSM validator.
output: A committed task pack #2 (AoI GeoJSON, tagging schema, gate artifacts, channel artifact) and an outcomes/<pack-id>.json recording validated-feature count, pass rate, validator sign-off, and changeset/TM references.
